abilities.name: run-away
abilities.shortEffect: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon is always successful fleeing from wild battles, even if trapped by a move or ability.
abilities.flavorText: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.

abilities.name: unburden
abilities.shortEffect: Doubles Speed upon using or losing a held item.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon uses or loses its held item, its Speed is doubled. If it gains another item or leaves battle, this bonus is lost. This includes when the Pokémon drops its item because of Knock Off. This bonus does not count as a stat modifier. There is no notification when this ability takes effect.
abilities.flavorText: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokémon's held item is used or lost.

abilities.name: stakeout
abilities.shortEffect: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.
abilities.flavorText: Doubles the damage dealt to a target that has just switched into battle.
